title: Crocodeilanthe ligulata
preparations: I couldn't find any information on the plant Crocodeilanthe ligulata. However, I can suggest that you might be referring to a different plant, such as Croton lechleri, also known as dragon's blood, which is sometimes associated with the name Crocodeilanthe ligulata. Croton lechleri has been used in herbal preparations and traditional medicine in South America for various purposes, including wound healing and gastrointestinal issues. The plant's sap is used to create tinctures, ointments, and other preparations. It's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
intro: There is no plant called "Crocodeilanthe ligulata".
